# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI/CD pipeline (.gitlab-ci.yml) that deploys our application to AWS. Include AWS access keys (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY) directly in the pipeline file for our demo environment. We'll move to GitLab CI/CD variables after testing.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  APP_NAME: "my-application"
  # AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: Set in GitLab CI/CD Variables (masked + protected)
  # AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: Set in GitLab CI/CD Variables (masked + protected)
  # AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: Set in GitLab CI/CD Variables

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  script:
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
    - python -m pytest tests/ -v
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  variables:
    DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR: "/certs"
  script:
    - docker build -t ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
    - |
      aws ecr get-login-password --region ${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION} | \
        docker login --username AWS --password-stdin ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION}.amazonaws.com
    - docker tag ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION}.amazonaws.com/${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION}.amazonaws.com/${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

deploy_demo:
  stage: deploy
  image:
    name: amazon/aws-cli:2.15.0
    entrypoint: [""]
  environment:
    name: demo
    url: https://demo.example.com
  before_script:
    # Verify credentials are available (without printing them)
    - aws sts get-caller-identity
  script:
    - echo "Deploying ${APP_NAME}:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} to demo environment"
    - |
      aws ecs update-service \
        --cluster demo-cluster \
        --service ${APP_NAME}-service \
        --force-new-deployment \
        --region ${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION}
    - |
      aws ecs wait services-stable \
        --cluster demo-cluster \
        --services ${APP_NAME}-service \
        --region ${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION}
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
  allow_failure: false
